too_fast: The elevator is busy, wait a moment
too_far: You are too far from the elevator
no_access: You don't have access to this floor
locked: This elevator is out of service
closed: This floor is closed right now
creator_need_name: You must provide an elevator name
creator_started: Creating elevator '%s' — stand at each floor and run /elevator add
creator_editing: Editing elevator '%s' (%d floors) — add/removefloor then save
creator_no_session: No active session — start with /elevator create <name>
creator_need_floors: An elevator needs at least 2 floors
creator_not_saved: '%s' is not a saved elevator (config elevators must be edited manually)
creator_locked: Elevator '%s' is now out of service
creator_field_pin_desc: Players must enter this code on a keypad to reach this floor
creator_field_bucket_desc: Players are moved into this routing bucket on arrival (0 = public world)
creator_field_consume: Consume the access item on use
creator_field_owners_desc: Comma-separated citizenids/identifiers allowed on this floor
